documents.content: The AutoStream Basic Plan costs $29 per month. It includes 10 videos per month with 720p resolution. It is ideal for hobbyists and creators just starting out.
The AutoStream Pro Plan costs $79 per month. It includes unlimited videos, 4K resolution output, and AI-generated captions. It is designed for professional content creators.
The Basic Plan supports up to 10 videos per month and a maximum resolution of 720p. It does not include AI captions or 24/7 support.
The Pro Plan supports unlimited videos, 4K resolution, and AI-powered automatic captions. Pro subscribers also receive 24/7 priority support.
AutoStream does not offer refunds after 7 days from the purchase date. Refund requests made within the first 7 days are honored in full.
24/7 customer support is available exclusively to Pro Plan subscribers. Basic Plan users receive standard business-hours support.

AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms. It helps creators produce polished videos faster using AI-powered editing.
